title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Protection of Interests in Aircraft Objects Act, 2025. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st day of May, 2025, vide notification No. S.O. 1937 (E), dated 30th day of April, 2025, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
